chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA Constt: Petition No.S-261 of 2025 (Raja Ali Vs. SHO, PS, A-Section Shahdadkot & Ors) a DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 01. For orders on office objection. 02. For hearing of main case. 13.11.2025 Petitioner is present in person. Mr. Abdul Waris Bhutto, Asstt.A.G, Sindh. *=.*=.*=.*=.*=.*=.*=.*=* In compliance with the Court’s order dated 03.11.2025, the alleged detainee, Mst. Anwar Khatoon is present and states that she has not been abducted by the private respondents and is residing with her parents of her own free will and consent. Her statement has also been recorded by the SHO, Police Station A-Section, Shahdadkot, under the cover of an affidavit. The report submitted by the SSP Kamber-Shahdadkot and the statement of respondent No.1 are taken on record. The petitioner, being her husband, filed the present writ of Habeas Corpus alleging that his legally wedded wife was under illegal confinement. The purpose of such a writ is to ensure the recovery of a person from unlawful custody. However, since the alleged detainee has appeared before the Court, affirmed her free will, and expressed that she is residing with her parents voluntarily and does not wish to live with the petitioner, the objective of the petition stands satisfied. Accordingly, the writ petition is disposed of, with no order as to costs. JUDGE
